Log.Location: "I10 W WO / RED CLOUD MINE RD MM 94"

details.IncidentDetail: "[75] CORONER ADVSD THEY WERENT ABLE TO OFFICIALLY IDENTIFY 1144 PTY / THERE WAS A MX ID BUT UNABLE TO MATCH DUE TO FACIAL INJ - CORONER WILL CONTACT DISPATCHER OF TRKG COMPANY"
"[71] 1039 LINE 69 BACK - ADVISED OF PTY WHOS AT DRMC // NO INFO PROVIDED ABOUT 1144 PTY, STILL WAITING ON NAME CONFIRMATION"
"[52] 76-86 WILL BE RUNNING A BREAK FROM THE WB SIDE "
"[47] LN 44 TRANSPORTED TO DESERT REGIONAL BY MERCY AIR 18 [Shared]"
"[35] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 H AND H RAMSEY 760-922-4161 // W/ SUPER HEAVY // CPZ LINE 28-29 [Shared]"
"[29] 76-S6 FOR 1185 ACCESS VIA RED CLOUD // WILL BE UNDER 10 FREEWAY BETWEEN EB AND WB ON RED CLOUD"
"[28] 76-S6 // REQ 1185 HD FOR // 13k (LOADED W/ DRYERS) TRACTOR AND TRAILER ON ITS SIDE // POSS HAZMAT WILL ADV FURTHER (100+GALS FUEL) DIRT AND ASFAULT\"
"[20] 97-S6 HAVE CAL FIRE RESPOND TO WB RED CLOUD / UNDER THE I10 [Shared]"
"[3] GOOD SAM IN KENWORT T680 ON RHS FOR VISUAL FOR OFFICERS"
"[2] RP WITNESSED BIG RIG FLIP OVER TO RHS "
